commands_run: rg -n "CREATE TABLE (epics|epic_events|codebases|code_artifacts)|REFERENCES epics|associated_epic" agent_kit/store/migrations/sqlite supabase/migrations agent_kit/store/sqlite.py agent_kit/store/supabase.py

python - <<'PY'
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path
conn = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
conn.execute('PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON')
for migration in sorted(Path('agent_kit/store/migrations/sqlite').glob('*.sql')):
    conn.executescript(migration.read_text())
print('sqlite_migrations_applied=', len(list(Path('agent_kit/store/migrations/sqlite').glob('*.sql'))), sep='')
for table in ('codebases', 'code_artifacts'):
    cols = [row[1] for row in conn.execute(f'PRAGMA table_info({table})')]
    print(table + ':' + ','.join(cols))
indexes = [row[1] for row in conn.execute("SELECT type, name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'index' AND tbl_name IN ('codebases', 'code_artifacts') ORDER BY name")]
print('indexes:' + ','.join(indexes))
PY

rg -n "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS codebases|CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS code_artifacts|owner TEXT|name TEXT|default_branch|scope|group_name|associated_epic_id|verified_accessible_at|expires_at|idx_codebases_owner_name_unique|idx_code_artifacts_api_cache_expires|idx_code_artifacts_api_cache_key" agent_kit/store/migrations/sqlite/008_codebase_research.sql supabase/migrations/202604300009_009_codebase_research.sql
